Thanks for sending a PR! Keep diffs focused — one logical change per PR.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for ground rules.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changes, and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (no behavior change beyond fixing the bug)
- [ ] New feature (driven from `src/config.js`)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Tooling / CI / deps

## Lighthouse scores (run on `npm run preview` against `localhost:4321`)

| Category | Before | After |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Performance | | |
| Accessibility | 100 | 100 |
| Best Practices | 100 | 100 |
| SEO | 100 | 100 |

<!-- Accessibility / Best Practices / SEO must stay at 100. Performance varies with logo. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:astro` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] I tested locally with `npm run dev` or `npm run preview`
- [ ] CSP / security headers in `public/_headers` are still valid (if touched)
- [ ] README / CONTRIBUTING updated if behavior or workflow changed

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- Optional. Paste anything that helps a reviewer understand the change. -->
